title: chaetopappa keerlioides
intro: Chaetopappa keerlioides, also known as Desert Chia, is a small shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Chaetopappa keerlioides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with its roots and leaves being the primary parts utilized in herbal preparations.
